summary: Iteration 25 - Friends/Favorite Users feature fully tested and verified. All backend APIs (GET/POST/DELETE/check) working correctly. Frontend friends screen accessible via profile menu. Mood-checkin dynamic verses confirmed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Friends page loads, profile link works, UI elements visible)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 features verified: 1) Friends API endpoints all working - GET /api/friends (list), POST /api/friends (add), DELETE /api/friends/{id} (remove), GET /api/friends/check/{id} (verify). 2) Frontend /friends screen accessible via profile page 'I Miei Amici' link with heart icon. 3) Friends screen shows title, subtitle (X Utenti preferiti), empty state message, and add friend button. 4) Profile page has friends link under 'Funzionalità App' section with translations in 6 languages. 5) Mood-checkin API returns verse object with 'ref' and 'text' fields (not 'verse_reference'/'verse_text' at root).

friends_get_api.notes: GET /api/friends returns array of friends with user_id, name, email, is_online, added_at fields

friends_add_api.notes: POST /api/friends with {friend_id} adds friend. Returns 400 if self/duplicate, 404 if user not found

friends_delete_api.notes: DELETE /api/friends/{friend_id} removes friend. Returns 404 if not found

friends_frontend_screen.notes: Route /friends registered in _layout.tsx, screen renders with header, empty state, add friend button

friends_profile_link.notes: Profile page shows 'I Miei Amici' link with heart icon under 'Funzionalità App' section

mood_checkin_dynamic_verses.notes: API returns different verses on each call via random.choice. Response structure: {mood, verse: {ref, text}, reflection, language}
